[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000000 1
1 10001000 2
2 00000000 a
3 00011000 2
4 00000100 1
5 01010100 3
6 11000000 2
7 01000110 3

01 10 01000110 3 match 7
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 11000000 2 match 6
34 43 10000010 2
45 54 10100001 3
56 65 00000000 a match 2
67 76 00000100 1 match 4
70 07 01001100 3

02 20 11000000 2 match 6
13 31 01000110 3 match 7
24 42 10000000 1 match 0
35 53 10001000 2 match 1
46 64 00000000 a match 2
57 75 00011000 2 match 3
60 06 00000100 1 match 4
71 17 01010100 3 match 5

03 30 11001110 5
14 41 00100010 2
25 52 10000000 1 match 0
36 63 00000100 1 match 4
47 74 00000000 a match 2
50 05 10001000 2 match 1
61 16 00000100 1 match 4
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 10000010 2
15 51 00110000 2
26 62 00000000 a match 2
37 73 01001100 3
